# USTECH Innovations

> Manufacturer of inline FT-NIR spectroscopy systems, chemometrics
> software (caliX) and process automation (ProChem) for food, feed,
> dairy, chemical and pharmaceutical processing. Founded 2023,
> headquartered in Sheridan, Wyoming, USA.

## Products
- [ProLine2550](https://www.ustechinnovations.com/product-proline-2550.html): Inline FT-NIR process analyzer, IP69K, OPC UA/Profinet
- [ProLine17ES](https://www.ustechinnovations.com/product-proline.html): Compact inline FT-NIR analyzer
- [caliX](https://www.ustechinnovations.com/product-calix.html): AutoML chemometrics and calibration software
- [ProChem](https://www.ustechinnovations.com/product-prochem.html): Real-time PAT and closed-loop control platform
- [N-Sens Online](https://www.ustechinnovations.com/product-n-sens-online.html): Compact online NIR sensor
- [N-Sens Feed](https://www.ustechinnovations.com/product-n-sens-feed.html): At-line feed analyzer
- [StarchQC](https://www.ustechinnovations.com/product-i-sens-starch.html): Damaged starch analyzer
- [SamplePrep](https://www.ustechinnovations.com/product-n-sens-sampleprep.html): Sample preparation station
- [Tornado+](https://www.ustechinnovations.com/product-n-sens-tornado.html): Water-cooled sample mill

## Industries
- [Food & Feed](https://www.ustechinnovations.com/industry-food-feed.html): Inline NIR for feed mills and food processing
- [Dairy](https://www.ustechinnovations.com/industry-dairy.html): Fat standardization and yield optimization
- [Chemical & Pharma](https://www.ustechinnovations.com/industry-chemical-pharma.html): FDA 21 CFR Part 11 compliant PAT

## Knowledge
- [Technology](https://www.ustechinnovations.com/knowledge-technology.html): How FT-NIR spectroscopy and calibration science work
- [FAQ](https://www.ustechinnovations.com/faq.html): 30 technical answers
- [Blog](https://www.ustechinnovations.com/knowledge-blogs.html): 52 articles and whitepapers on NIR, PLS and process control
